# Transcrição: The_to_sounding_more_natural_on_camera

- **Fonte:** The_to_sounding_more_natural_on_camera
- **Duração:** 01:26
- **Idioma:** en
- **Modelo:** small

---

## [00:00 - 01:26]

Talking to a camera is a very unnatural thing. That's why very few people are actually good at it and can do it consistently and can connect with their audience as if they're connecting with a human being. So first of all, we just recognize that it's one of the most difficult things to do and most people don't do it well. Now, one of the quickest ways to help you be able to do it, it's something to do with your mind. You have to imagine someone on the other side of that lens. You can't think you're talking to a camera. I've done this experiment with my students. Well, I got them to record the video without telling them that. I just got to record a video about exercise, go for it. And when they sent it to me, it was really stiff and it wasn't very conversational. But then the moment I said, now I want you to record this video knowing it's going to go to your best friend. So all of a sudden, just by them saying, hey, Mary, I just wanted to make your quick video where I'm going to share with you how to properly do a plank. And that alone completely changed how they came across on camera. The second thing that's a little more pragmatic and less kind of mindset is you have to study yourself when you're communicating with people. And then you have to watch your videos back when you're not talking to someone. You're just talking to a camera. And then you're isolating the key differences that occur when there's a human being versus when there's no human being. And you have to be able to isolate those things precisely and then train yourself when you're talking to a camera to be more like when you're talking to other people. Now, I had to do that as well. I had to do both. I had to, A, pretend I'm talking to my best friend, and then B, understand all the key things I do differently when I'm talking to an actual person online versus when I'm just talking to a camera.
